overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from GTA V showing a character walking through an urban Los Santos street. The character navigates sidewalks, crosses intersections with light traffic, and passes by various commercial buildings including a wax museum and graffiti-covered storefronts on a clear sunny day.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban sidewalk adjacent to brick retaining wall

events.description: red SUV passes closely by on the right side of the character

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk next to a curved brick retaining wall, approaching an intersection

notable_agents.action: red SUV driving past the character on the multi-lane street

entered.detail: curved red brick wall with concrete cap running along the sidewalk edge
ornate multi-story building with decorative facade at the street intersection
tall palm trees lining the left side of the street
ornate black metal street lamp with decorative base
multi-lane asphalt street with yellow dividing lines

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a concrete sidewalk bordered by a curved brick retaining wall on the left. The street is lined with palm trees, and an ornate historic building stands at the intersection ahead. A red SUV passes by on the right as the character approaches the crosswalk.

events.description: green SUV stops at the curb to allow the character to cross
character steps off the curb and enters the marked crosswalk

agents.ego_description: crossing the multi-lane street from the sidewalk, navigating around the stopped green SUV

notable_agents.action: green SUV stopped at the curb waiting for the pedestrian to finish crossing

entered.detail: white striped pedestrian crossing painted on the asphalt road
commercial building with distinctive red awnings and signage visible across the street

segments.scene_description: The character leaves the sidewalk and enters a wide intersection crosswalk. A green SUV stops at the curb to let the character pass. The wax museum building with red awnings becomes visible across the street as the character crosses the asphalt road marked with white crosswalk stripes.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial street with wax museum and weathered buildings

events.description: character reaches the opposite sidewalk and continues walking past commercial storefronts

agents.ego_description: walking along the new sidewalk passing the wax museum building and approaching a graffiti-covered structure

entered.detail: weathered building facade with extensive graffiti and boarded-up windows
row of commercial buildings with metal security gates and faded signage

segments.scene_description: Having crossed the street, the character walks along a commercial sidewalk lined with palm trees on the left. The character passes by the wax museum with its red awnings and continues past buildings showing signs of urban decay, including graffiti-covered walls and closed storefronts with metal security grates.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban commercial sidewalk with security grates and alleyways

events.description: pedestrians become visible walking ahead on the sidewalk in the distance

agents.ego_description: continuing down the sidewalk past closed storefronts with metal security grates, approaching other pedestrians ahead

notable_agents.action: pedestrian walking ahead on the sidewalk in the same direction as the character

entered.detail: metal roll-down security gates covering the storefront entrances
large purple advertisement billboard mounted on the building wall

segments.scene_description: The character continues walking along the urban sidewalk, passing by closed commercial buildings protected by metal security grates. Palm trees continue to line the left side of the street. Other pedestrians become visible walking ahead in the same direction, and a large purple billboard is mounted on one of the buildings.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a sunny urban street that transitions from a polished historic district into a more weathered commercial area. It begins with the character walking along a concrete sidewalk bordered by a curved brick wall and palm trees, passing a red SUV as they approach an ornate building at an intersection. As the character enters the wide crosswalk, a green SUV stops at the curb, allowing the view to open up toward a wax museum with distinctive red awnings across the asphalt. The scene then shifts as the character reaches the opposite sidewalk, moving past the museum and into a stretch of urban decay characterized by graffiti-covered walls and closed storefronts with metal security grates. Finally, the camera continues forward past more gated buildings and a large purple billboard, following other pedestrians under the steady line of palm trees.
